column2: Blog Miscellaneous How Memory Works In Codex CLI • Himanshu Sangshetti May 8, 2026 Codex is OpenAI's coding-agent product line. In 2026 it has three surfaces: a CLI, an IDE extension, and a cloud workspace inside ChatGPT. All three share an engine and a ~/.codex/ config directory. Cookie Settings The CLI is the most thoroughly documented surface and the focus of this post. Most of what follows We use cookies to personalize content, run ads, and applies transitively to the IDE extension, since the two share the same config and memory layout. analyze traffic. Read our Cookie Policy. The cloud surface is mentioned in OpenAI's announcements but underspecified in public docs.
